mapper.select: SELECT * FROM culture_experiences WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO culture_experiences (name, cover_image, images, region, address, latitude, longitude, category, duration, price, description, highlights, booking_info, open_time, phone, tags, rating, is_recommended, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{region}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{category}, #{duration}, #{price}, #{description}, #{highlights}, #{bookingInfo}, #{openTime}, #{phone}, #{tags}, #{rating}, #{isRecommended}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE culture_experiences SET name = #{name}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, images = #{images}, region = #{region}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, category = #{category}, duration = #{duration}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, highlights = #{highlights}, booking_info = #{bookingInfo}, open_time = #{openTime}, phone = #{phone}, tags = #{tags}, rating = #{rating}, is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE culture_experiences SET is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
